label: resource_id_territory
description: ADR-19 A2.3 — Read/Edit/Grep on the same file must share node identity in the stale graph. Pre-A2.3, (read, src/a.py) / (edit, src/a.py) / (grep, src/a.py) were 3 distinct nodes. Post-A2.3, they are all node 'src/a.py'. Includes an unreachable goal (intent-source obligation on unvisited scope) so the scorer stays in exploit_goal for t=1-3 rather than falling into terminal, letting the stale counter actually run.

obligations.description: goal scope never visited — keeps P=∅ without triggering terminal
